privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating specific synthetic entities in Snipe-IT. Setup scripts explicitly delete any pre-existing matching records for users ('rchen', 'mwebb', 'pkapoor'), assets ('NB-001' to 'NB-004'), and companies ('TechVantage Solutions', 'NovaBridge Consulting') to ensure a clean slate. The verifier explicitly checks the Snipe-IT MySQL database to confirm the successful creation of these entities, verifying exact serial numbers ('NB-SN-40981' to 'NB-SN-40984'), correct checkouts of NB-001 through NB-003 to the respective users, NB-004 remaining unassigned, and all four assets being successfully reassigned to the 'TechVantage Solutions' company without any collateral asset creation.
